title: [I Built] Interactive Brokers  MCP
author: nitayrabi
selftext:
Hey!

I’ve developed the Interactive Brokers MCP: [https://github.com/code-rabi/interactive-brokers-mcp](https://github.com/code-rabi/interactive-brokers-mcp)

I’ve been using it for a while now, both in offline flows — deployed apps, n8n flows — and with agents, including my own OpenClaw.

Whether you’re building something and want to give an agent access to IB, or you just want to consult with your AI agent over your live IB portfolio, feel free to use it. It’s totally open source and battle-tested to some extent. I’ve used it myself, and others have contributed fixes, so it’s actively used.

Open to feedback, suggestions, and contributions.
